title: cyclosorus austerus
intro: Cyclosorus austerus, also known as the Australian sword fern, is a type of flowering plant in the family Blechnaceae, native to Australia and New Zealand. Traditionally, Cyclosorus austerus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating skin infections. In herbal preparations, Cyclosorus austerus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
